channel.title: NAAK Srivastav, N Sharma, AJ Samuel | PlatCOVID
channel.description: NAAK Srivastav, N Sharma, AJ Samuel

image.title: NAAK Srivastav, N Sharma, AJ Samuel

item.title: Impact of Coronavirus disease-19 (COVID-19) lockdown on physical activity and energy expenditure among physiotherapy professionals and students using web-based open E-survey sent through WhatsApp, Facebook and Instagram messengers.
